member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetAccountById(System.Int64)
member.summary: Get account by Id from the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetAccountsForRange(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get all accounts for the given range in the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetAccountsByRegistrationDate(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Get all accounts by the given registration date range in the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetAccountsByModifyDate(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Get all accounts by the given modification date range in the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetAllAccounts
member.summary: Get all accounts from the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!
member.returns: List of all accounts or null

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetAllAccountLogins
member.summary: Get all accounts logins from the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!
member.returns: List of all accounts logins or null

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestAccountById(System.Int64)
member.summary: Request account by Id directly from Trading Platform.

member.summary: Request accounts by Ids directly from Trading Platform.

member.summary: Request accounts by the given registration date range directly from Trading Platform.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestAccountsByModifyDate(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Request accounts by the given modification date range directly from Trading Platform.

member.summary: Request all accounts directly from Trading Platform.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestAllAccountLogins
member.summary: Request all accounts logins directly from Trading Platform.
member.returns: List of accounts logins or null

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestAllAccountsFilter(System.String)
member.summary: Request filtered accounts directly from Trading Platform.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestAllAccountsFilterList(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Request filtered accounts directly from Trading Platform.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPCreateAccount(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.AccountNewRequest)
member.summary: Create new account.
member.returns: Info of successfully created account or null if failed

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPModifyAccount(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.AccountModifyRequest)
member.summary: Modify existing account.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPModifyAccountBalance(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.AccountBalanceRequest)
member.summary: Modify account balance. Deposit/withdrawal account balance. (Deprecated. Does not support Cash accounts.)

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPDepositWithdrawal(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.DepositWithdrawalRequest)
member.summary: Deposit (or withdraw) money on account. Replaces ModifyAccountBalance method. Supports Cash accounts.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPTransferMoney(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.TransferMoneyRequest)
member.summary: Transfer money for two accounts

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPModifyAccountCredit(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.AccountCreditRequest)
member.summary: Modify account credit. Credit in/out account balance.

member.summary: Validate account.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPValidateReadonlyAccount(System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Validate readonly account.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPValidateLogin(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validate login.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPModifyAccountState(System.Int64,Manager.Common.Contract.BusinessObjects.TPAccountState)
member.summary: Modify account state.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPGetDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Get the current domain configuration from the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!

member.summary: Get the current domains configurations for all domains from the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!
member.returns: List of the current domains configurations or null

member.summary: Request domain info by name.

member.summary: Get the current domains configurations for all domains from the Trading Platform pumping. Works only in pumping mode!
member.returns: List of the current domains configurations or null

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestLogin(System.String)
member.summary: Request login by username directly from Trading Platform.

member.summary: Request logins by account login directly from Trading Platform.
member.returns: List of login info for Account

member.summary: Create new login.
member.returns: Info of successfully created login or null if failed

member.summary: Modify existing login.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPDeleteLogin(System.String)
member.summary: Delete existing login.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPRequestWebApiToken(System.String)
member.summary: Request Web API token by Id directly from Trading Platform.

member.summary: Request all Web API tokens by account login directly from Trading Platform.
member.returns: List of all Web API tokens for Account

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPCreateWebApiToken(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.WebApiTokenNewRequest)
member.summary: Create new Web API token.
member.returns: Info of successfully created Web API token or null if failed

member.summary: Modify existing Web API token.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPDeleteWebApiToken(System.String)
member.summary: Delete existing Web API token.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPValidateWebApiToken(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Validate Web API token key and secret.

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPResetWebApiTokenSecret(System.String)
member.summary: Reset Web API token key and secret.
member.returns: New Web API token key and secret

member.name: M:Manager.TP.Contract.ITPManagerContract.TPCreateAuthenticationToken(TickTrader.BusinessObjects.Requests.AuthTokenRequest)
member.summary: OAuth 2.0: Create new Access Token
member.returns: The result contains a successfully created Access Token
member.exception: The method is not supported by TTS
Invalid request or account with username was not found or internal error
